diagrams.title: Cayley-Hamilton Substitution Process
diagrams.description: Shows how to substitute matrix A into characteristic polynomial to get zero matrix
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the CH theorem substitution process step by step

diagrams.title: 2×2 Matrix Power Reduction
diagrams.description: Diagram showing how to reduce higher powers of 2×2 matrix using characteristic equation
elements: Result in terms of A and I
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for computing high powers using CH theorem

diagrams.title: Eigenvalue Relationships
diagrams.description: Shows relationships between trace, determinant, eigenvalues, and coefficients of characteristic polynomial
diagrams.purpose: Connect eigenvalues to matrix properties and polynomial coefficients
